hero.hero_overview:
Paquito is a fighter who seeks ultimate strength. After facing his former master, who turns evil, he learns that true power is not about destruction, but about protecting justice and hope. He becomes a hero known as the Sacred Fist.
Paquito is a strong early-game fighter who controls the tempo of the match.
With the right rotation, he levels up quickly, and by targeting the right enemies, he can carry the game.
hero.hero_strength:
Paquito clears minion waves quickly, wins early trades, and gains a level advantage.
Early game: Very strong, dominates the lane and sets the tempo.
Mid game: His strongest phase, highly effective in skirmishes and objective fights.
Late game: Still useful, but requires proper target selection and timing.
Paquito is effective against squishy, immobile carries and fighters with weak early-game presence. He performs best with an aggressive playstyle and proper combo execution.
hero.hero_weakness:
Paquito struggles against tanky heroes, heavy crowd control, high sustain, and long-range poke compositions.
Heroes that counter Paquito:
Terizla
Yu Zhong
Esmeralda
Thamuz
Khaleed
Kaja
Franco
Ruby
Akai
Valir
Yve
Pharsa

data.recommend: Proper timing and combo execution unlock Paquito’s full potential.

hero.hero_overview: Paquito is an aggressive fighter hero in MLBB inspired by boxer Manny Pacquiao, specializing in physical burst damage, mobility, and chase with his Champ Stance passive, which enhances his skills upon collecting four stacks from basic attacks or skill damage. He is strong in 1v1s and team fights due to his low cooldowns and ability to chain enhanced skills without cooldowns, making him a high-skill, high-reward hero who excels in the EXP lane.
hero.hero_strength: high burst damage, excellent mobility via dashes and knockbacks, strong sustainability with shields and no mana restrictions, and versatile Crowd Control (CC) with knock-ups and pushes.
hero.hero_weakness: Paquito's main weaknesses include a vulnerability to strong crowd control (CC) heroes,

data.title: Paquito Build 2025

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's crowd control, skills and tankiness allow paquito to dive safely to burst down. Their synergy creates a solid frontline and sets up easy kills for Paquito with minimal interruption.

counters.counter_desc: Khufra's Bouncing Ball and Toughness can prevent Paquito from diving in by knocking him up or immobilizing him during his skill combos.

dominants.dominant_desc:
*Tips: Play with full stack, at 3 stack your next skill becomes Enhanced (stronger, no cooldown).

*Combos: skill 2 + skill 2 + skill 1 + skill 3 + skill 2 (full stack)

*Strategy: burst backliners with full combos, don't dive first wait then clean up
dominants.dominant_title: Focus on fast jungle clear, gank sidelanes after hitting level 4,wait for frontliner to engage.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Rupture: More early damage with physical penetration.
Master Assassin: Bonus damage when enemies are alone—great for pick-offs.
Lethal Ignition: Extra burn damage after combos—boosts burst potential.

equips.equip_desc: Maximize burst, mobility, and healing reduction—perfect for assassinating cores.

hero.hero_overview:
Role: Fighter

Specialty: Burst / Mobility

Lane: EXP Lane / Jungle
hero.hero_strength:
No Mana: Can spam skills freely.

High Burst Damage: Skill combos can quickly delete enemies.

Mobility: Dashes and knockbacks let him outplay and escape.

Champ Stance: Enhanced skills after 3 stacks give extra power.
hero.hero_weakness:
Combo Dependent: Needs precise timing.

CC Vulnerable: Can be shut down if interrupted.

Hard to Master: High skill ceiling due to stack management.

data.recommend: This Paquito guide is perfect for players wanting to master his burst damage, mobility, and combos.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With Floryn's super heal and sustain, this duo is unbeatable the late game, as Paquito in the frontline and Floryn with backline support.

counters.counter_desc: Knowing combos of Paquito and utilizing it perfectly against a player who has mastered Benedetta gives you full advantage especially when giving Benedetta a hard time clearing minions in the early game.

dominants.dominant_desc: When laning with hard CC match ups, max level skill 1 for better sustain. Take fights whenever farm is being invaded or going for objectives especially turtles and buffs.
dominants.dominant_title: As much as possible last hit minions in the first 4-5 minutes so that you'll be level before turtle fight

emblems.emblem_desc: Going full sustain gives you advantage for longer team fights, sustaining frontline, zoning enemies and Lord dances.

equips.equip_desc: This set gives you balanced damage and health sustain mainly because of the War Axe and Bruteforce. Queen's wings give you damage reduction and vd for your skills during low health.

hero.hero_overview: With Paquito complex combos, he can sustain any lane as long as you are playing with the late game in mind.
hero.hero_strength: Paquito has a laning advantage if you know how to utilize his combos fully. Enhanced 1st skill gives you shield sustain, enhanced 2nd skill gives you burst damage and enhanced ultimate gives you knock up/hard CC. Utilizing combos likes 3-2-1-3-3(hard CC combo), or 2-1-3-2-2(damage burst) and 1-3-2-1-1(full shield utilization) can be an advantage.
hero.hero_weakness: Paquito is weak to hard CC match ups like Yuzhong, Lukas and more.

data.recommend: Highly recommended for newbies learning Paquito's full potential in combos before going full damage on Paquito.

spell.spell_desc: Highly recommended for frontline sustain in the late game. Especially against magic hero line up on the enemy team.

hero.hero_overview:
High Damage: Relies on consecutive attacks to increase damage.

Fast Mobility: Has skills that help him move quickly in battle.

Combat Flexibility: Can easily engage and disengage from fights.

Extra Shield: Possesses a skill that grants him a shield to absorb some damage.
hero.hero_strength:
1. High and Burst Damage: Paquito deals massive damage, especially when activating Champ Stance, allowing him to use skills without cooldowns.


2. Combat Mobility: With his Dash skills, he can easily engage and disengage from fights.


3. Strong Crowd Control: He has skills that slow and stun enemies, making him effective in stopping or chasing opponents.


4. Extra Shield and Survivability: Using consecutive skills grants him an extra shield, helping him withstand damage in battle.


5. No Mana Dependency: He can freely use his skills without worrying about running out of energy.


6. Versatile Playstyle: He can switch roles between a fast assassin or a frontline fighter depending on the situation.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Combo Dependent: If he fails to execute his combo correctly, he can become weak and ineffective in fights.


2. Limited Skill Range: His abilities rely on close combat, making him vulnerable to long-range heroes.


3. No Sustain Ability: He lacks life-steal or healing skills, making him weaker against heroes who can sustain in long battles.


4. Timing Dependent: His skills must be used at the right moment to maximize damage; otherwise, he may lose the fight.


5. Weak Against Crowd Control (CC): He is highly affected by stuns and immobilization, preventing him from executing his skills quickly.


6. High Skill Requirement: He is not an easy hero to use and requires good practice to master.

Also, after the heroes, it is difficult to confront them, such as Khafre or Menestar, who prevent the flash for the hero.

data.recommend: Paquito is a powerful hero with high damage and fast mobility, but he requires skill in executing combos correctly to maximize his potential. With a focus on timing attacks, building the right items

spell.spell_desc: Flicker

data.title: Paquito guide for massive damage

cooperates.cooperate_desc: I particular play Paquito as more of an assassin with not much support but if I would recommend a hero to be paired up with him I would prefer a support who can give mobility such as Angela and Mathilda or heros who can lockdown enemy in one area for easier kills like Tigreal and Atlas.

counters.counter_desc: Paquito in this build is very vulnerable to CC skills. Minsitthar is a direct counter for Paquito as he mostly really in his dash skills. Some one like Eudora and Saber can easily kill hit with their fast damage and burst. So I am very particular at looking at the map and play much safer if I am being counter picked.

dominants.dominant_desc: Buy the first sub-item of hunter strike then proceed to sky piercer as that item will give the additional penetration you need and sky piercer as sky piercer offers a good amount of damage for a cheap price. This two together is enough to burst squishy or any half health hero in enemy side. For buying boots, buy the defensive item of boots first and poke the enemy with your second skill as this will surprise them of some damage and if they comeback and your done on cooldown, that's your kill que.

Paquito will become less effective to the game progress to late game as some hero gets really tough and they may already have defensive item at that time. So get those kills as early as possible and snowball, don't let them get a chance to strike back specially if most of their hero is hard to kill

emblems.emblem_desc: Very high power for paquito's full combo

equips.equip_desc: Buy normal boots and don't complete it till you get the first two items.Prioritize getting hunter strike before sky piercer because his damage is very weak at early game is you buy sky piercer first. You can choose if you want to complete the boots after ward or go direct to BOD. Last two slots will be in your choice. Those two are my recommendation since it gives extra penetration and sustain.
This some item I frequently use in adopting my build for paquito.

hero.hero_overview: High power with minimal sustain
hero.hero_strength: Quick kills and burst damage, 1 combo killer
hero.hero_weakness: Very vulnerable when on cooldown and has weak sustain and durability

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best for paquito's in this build as it offer a scape option when the situation gets sticky.
